name: Carpet and vinyl flooring
examples: Carpet, vinyl plank, sheet vinyl — treated as short-life floor coverings.

name: Removable fixtures
examples: Blinds, decorative fixtures, unit-specific removable items.

name: Site work and hardscape
examples: Parking lot, sidewalks, curbs, trash enclosure.

name: Exterior lighting, fencing, signage
examples: Parking lot lighting, perimeter fencing, property signage.

name: Building structure
examples: Foundation, framing, roof, exterior walls, windows, doors.

name: Core building systems
examples: HVAC (central or per-unit), plumbing, electrical, water heaters.
